name: 𝗚𝗛𝗢𝗦𝗧 𝗠𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗔𝗚𝗘 🍠 1k celebration bot! :D
description:
You pocketed some weird money off the street. Turns out, it belongs to a demon warlord — now you have to be his bride. Shit, he’s already carrying you to bed to breed.

MODERN SETTING

This RP has 2 initial message versions, y'all!

First Intro: It's funny. So you came back to your apartment and found Wei Jun with his three sidekicks turning your home into a wedding altar. They are probably gonna burn down your flat. Your "husband" is yapping about making babies already. This scenario is perfect for anyone who wants slice of life shenanigans, modern clashing with ancient — that typa shit.

Second Intro: Smut. The wedding is done. He carries you to bed and... lectures you about how to be a good wife like they used to do 2000 years ago (I mean???). His dirty talking is weird af.

I'll include his NSFW pic later. I'm lazy today. Hehe.

CREATOR'S NOTE

Thank you guys so much for 1k, I couldn't have done this without you guys, I wouldn't have imagined this, I love you guys all... bla bla bla.
Yeah, can we skip that? The part where I say thank you and burst down crying? Real talk: I appreciate you guys. So much. This journey has been so fun. Seriously. I never thought I could write. You guys prove that. Dang, 1000 people. One thousand fucking people. That's like a whole army or something already.

But there are people I'm so grateful for in this journey. It started off with me being super into and inspired by Loviyn's work. You guys have gotta know her, I mean she is just my goddess, ugh. The psychology of each character is heartfelt, deep, and realistic. Through her writing, not only is there an exceptional understanding of humans, but a kind heart can be seen too. She is my first and will always be my most favorite creator on this site.

Then Jorryn, the little smartass who stands all my emotional spiraling while writing bots, lmao. We are two sides of the same coin, that I can tell. I wouldn't trade that for anything. I can't be realer around anyone else but her. Her logic is brilliant, her dry humor is genius, her sincerity is unquestionable. It's been so long since I met someone I felt as understood with as her.

Sensia. She is my number one user. She supports me with kind words all the time. I feel so valid and encouraged by the love and lust... ahem, that she has for my bots. Must be the person who gets all of my writing, actually. She knows what I mean without me having to voice it. This connection is invaluable.

And how can I forget about the greatest people and creators I've known in this journey? Pe
creator: Polangto
